title: Design livestock handling facilities
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design livestock handling facilities demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine requirements

pcs.text: Assess and clarify requirements for livestock handling facilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and clarify requirements for livestock handling facilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and clarify requirements for livestock handling facilities.

pcs.text: Negotiate and confirm cost structures and timelines according to workplace budgetary constraints
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Negotiate and confirm cost structures and timelines according to workplace budgetary constraints?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Negotiate and confirm cost structures and timelines according to workplace budgetary constraints.

pcs.text: Obtain and assess plans for livestock handling facilities from a variety of sources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and assess plans for livestock handling facilities from a variety of sources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and assess plans for livestock handling facilities from a variety of sources.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine requirements

elements.title: Undertake a site analysis

pcs.text: Inspect location of new or existing site and record physical elements and features of the site for assessment of suitability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect location of new or existing site and record physical elements and features of the site for assessment of suitability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect location of new or existing site and record physical elements and features of the site for assessment of suitability.

pcs.text: Specify surveys to be undertaken and determine tolerances according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Specify surveys to be undertaken and determine tolerances according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify surveys to be undertaken and determine tolerances according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Assess and determine site preparation requirements according to workplace policies and site parameters
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and determine site preparation requirements according to workplace policies and site parameters?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and determine site preparation requirements according to workplace policies and site parameters.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Undertake a site analysis

elements.title: Prepare a design brief

pcs.text: Modify plans according to the individual site and workplace objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Modify plans according to the individual site and workplace objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Modify plans according to the individual site and workplace objectives.

pcs.text: Assess options to modify existing facilities or establish alternative handling operations, and obtain quotes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess options to modify existing facilities or establish alternative handling operations, and obtain quotes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess options to modify existing facilities or establish alternative handling operations, and obtain quotes.

pcs.text: Identify and incorporate relevant workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity and environment and sustainability requirements, and workplace quality assurance requirements into the design plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and incorporate relevant workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity and environment and sustainability requirements, and workplace quality assurance requirements into the design plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and incorporate relevant workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity and environment and sustainability requirements, and workplace quality assurance requirements into the design plan.

pcs.text: Identify legal requirements and constraints on development processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify legal requirements and constraints on development processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify legal requirements and constraints on development processes.

pcs.text: Prepare design brief and undertake consultation to establish agreement on options and approaches for development
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare design brief and undertake consultation to establish agreement on options and approaches for development?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare design brief and undertake consultation to establish agreement on options and approaches for development.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare a design brief

elements.title: Develop a final plan

pcs.text: Prepare recommendations based on the analysis of data and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare recommendations based on the analysis of data and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare recommendations based on the analysis of data and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Obtain authorisations and approvals required for implementation of the plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain authorisations and approvals required for implementation of the plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain authorisations and approvals required for implementation of the plan.

pcs.text: Produce detailed plan according to workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity and environment requirements and workplace objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Produce detailed plan according to workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity and environment requirements and workplace objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Produce detailed plan according to workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity and environment requirements and workplace objectives.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Develop a final plan
